cases.prompt: 앱에 AdMob 연동해서 광고 붙여줘. 보상형 광고도 추가하고 싶어.

assertions.text: Integrates the right ad SDK (AdMob for mobile) and sets up rewarded video with a reward callback.
Applies placement strategy and frequency limits, e.g. interstitials at least 60 seconds apart at natural transition points.
Includes a verification checklist with test ad IDs and Google Ad Policy / ATT consent compliance.

cases.prompt: Implement ads on my website with AdSense and add an AdBlock fallback.

assertions.text: Selects AdSense for web ads and chooses non-intrusive placements.
Adds AdBlock detection with a fallback message or alternate revenue prompt.
Balances ads with paid conversion via a 'remove ads in Pro' CTA.
